summary: Phase 3 Refactoring (FSD Completo + Robustez Backend) fully tested and verified. All 22 backend tests passed (100%). All 8 frontend navigation tests passed (100%). Lazy loading, FSD barrel exports, and exception handling improvements all working correctly.
passed_tests: ✅ B-08: No 'except Exception: pass' in application/adapters code - now all use logger.warning
✅ B-08a: usecases.py email exception logs with 'Falha ao enviar email'
✅ B-08b: excel_parser.py row parsing logs with 'Erro na linha'
✅ B-09: TxtGenerator uses TxtConfig dataclass with externalized constants
✅ B-09a: TxtConfig @dataclass defined with all fields (codigo_registro_marcador, etc.)
✅ B-09b: TxtGenerator __init__ accepts config: TxtConfig parameter
✅ B-09c: DEFAULT_TXT_CONFIG constant defined
✅ F-10: Lazy loading - App.js uses React.lazy + Suspense with PageLoader fallback
✅ F-10a: 9 components lazy loaded (UploadForm, LotesList, LoteDetail, etc.)
✅ F-10b: Dashboard remains eager loaded (not lazy)
✅ F-02: FSD barrel exports exist in features/ and shared/ directories
✅ F-02a: 7 feature barrel exports (dashboard, layouts, lotes, mapeamentos, pendencias, perfis-saida, upload)
✅ F-02b: 2 shared barrel exports (api, hooks)
✅ Default exports: LayoutsList, LayoutForm, LayoutDetail, PerfisSaidaList all have default export
✅ API: GET /api/health - Returns healthy status
✅ API: GET /api/v1/lotes/estatisticas - Returns statistics
✅ API: GET /api/v1/import-layouts - Returns layouts with total_regras field
✅ API: GET /api/v1/account-mappings - Returns mappings list
✅ API: GET /api/v1/output-profiles - Returns profiles list
✅ Frontend: Dashboard loads (eager, data-testid='dashboard')
✅ Frontend: /layouts page loads (lazy, data-testid='layouts-page')
✅ Frontend: /upload page loads (lazy, data-testid='upload-form')
✅ Frontend: /lotes page loads (lazy, data-testid='lotes-list')
✅ Frontend: /perfis-saida page loads (lazy, data-testid='output-profiles-page')
✅ Frontend: 404 page works for invalid URLs (data-testid='not-found-page')
✅ Frontend: /home redirects to / correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Note: database.py line 51 has 'except Exception: pass' but it's intentional for 'CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS' idempotency - acceptable pattern for DDL operations
Pre-existing: React Router v7 future flag warnings in console (v7_startTransition, v7_relativeSplatPath) - cosmetic, not blocking
seed_data_creation: None - used existing 2 layouts and 2 output profiles
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 verified: (1) Exception handling improved - usecases.py and excel_parser.py now log exceptions instead of silent pass, (2) TxtGenerator refactored with TxtConfig dataclass for all magic numbers/constants, (3) App.js uses React.lazy() for 9 page components with Suspense fallback, Dashboard stays eager, (4) FSD barrel exports created in /app/frontend/src/features/*/index.js and /app/frontend/src/shared/*/index.js, (5) 4 components have default exports added for lazy loading compatibility

phase3_verification.B-08_exception_logging: VERIFIED - No silent 'except Exception: pass' in application/adapters code
phase3_verification.B-09_txtconfig_dataclass: VERIFIED - TxtConfig dataclass with codigo_registro_marcador, codigo_registro_lancamento, mapeamento_operacao etc.
phase3_verification.F-10_lazy_loading: VERIFIED - 9 components lazy loaded via React.lazy(), Suspense with PageLoader fallback
phase3_verification.F-02_fsd_barrel_exports: VERIFIED - 7 feature barrels + 2 shared barrels exist and export correctly
phase3_verification.default_exports: VERIFIED - LayoutsList, LayoutForm, LayoutDetail, PerfisSaidaList all have 'export default'
